zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Appleton於大約1442年出生在英國素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德時，他的父親John Appleton39歲，母親Margaret Welling30歲。他於大約1470年與Margaret Crane在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1507年10月4日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴貝。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Appleton于大约1442年出生在英国素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德时，他的父亲John Appleton39岁，母亲Margaret Welling30岁。他于大约1470年与Margaret Crane在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1507年10月4日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可巴貝。

nameMeanings.name: Appleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England named Appleton, from Old English æppeltūn ‘orchard’ (literally ‘apple enclosure’). Apples were particularly important in the Middle Ages as a food for survival through the winter.
History: This surname was brought to North America in 1635 by Samuel Appleton, who migrated from Ipswich, England, to Ipswich, MA.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Appleton was born about 1442, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, his father, John Appleton, was 39 and his mother, Margaret Welling, was 30. He married Margaret Crane about 1470, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 4 October 1507, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Babergh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Appleton est né environ 1442, à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Appleton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret Welling, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Crane environ 1470, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1507, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Babergh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Appleton um 1442 in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Appleton 39 und seine Mutter Margaret Welling 30. Er hat um 1470 in Lavenham, Suffolk, England Margaret Crane geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1507 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Babergh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Appleton è nato il circa 1442 nel Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Appleton, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Welling, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Crane circa 1470, nel Lavenham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 ottobre 1507, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Babergh, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Appletonが約1442年にイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドで生まれた時，父John Appletonは39歳，母Margaret Wellingは30歳であった。約1470年にイギリススフォルクラベンハムでMargaret Craneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1507年10月4日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクババーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Appleton(이)가 대략 1442년 영국 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Appleton(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Welling(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1470년 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에서 Margaret Crane(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1507년 10월 4일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베이버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Appleton nasceu aproximadamente 1442, em Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Appleton, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Welling, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Crane aproximadamente 1470, em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1507, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Babergh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Appleton родился около 1442 г. в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Appleton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Welling, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Crane около 1470 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 октября 1507 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности бабирг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Appleton nació aproximadamente 1442, en Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Appleton, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margaret Welling, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret Crane aproximadamente 1470, en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1507, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Babergh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
